SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this 1st day of October 2023, by and between:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678Z), residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 9123 4567 or via email at tanweiming@fakesg.sg.

2. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC: S3456789A), representing Abdullah Holdings Pte Ltd (UEN: 198765432A), located at 456 Clementi Avenue, #01-02, Singapore 123456, contactable at +65 9876 5432 or aishah@fakesg.sg.

The parties hereby agree to the sale and purchase of shares in Abdullah Holdings Pte Ltd for the total consideration of SGD 500,000 (Five Hundred Thousand Singapore Dollars).

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
